1847480.name: RocketBallZ
1847480.description:
A game where balls are king. Where teams have to keep the ball on the other side to bring down the opposing team's countdown. The first team with no time remaining loses the game!

Objective:


One Team on each side of the wall with a ball in the center. You have to pickup the ball and trow on the opposite side as soon as you can to stay in game !
You can jump, grapple hook, roll and many more way to get to the ball as quick as possible and try keep all BallZ on the other side of the wall.
The timer of your team will go down when both ballz are on your side and if you have no more time left, you loose.

Enemy or Ally AI

You can add more fun to the game by playing with monster or robot AI in the match (by level), some of them will chase you other will kick the ball and some ally could help you find the ball when on your side.

Play online in One on One battle or go up to 6 Players in a 3vs3. Team Up with local partner to the field.
